wrong_code:
#include<bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;int read(){int num=0,f=1;char c;while(!isdigit(c=getchar()))if(c=='-')f=-1;while(isdigit(c))num=num*10+(c&15),c=getchar();return num*f;}const int N=(1<<20)+5,M=1<<11;mt19937 Rand(13462792);int n,m,q,k,x,a[N],b[M],A[N],B[N];void op(int x,int y){for(int i=y;i>=0;i=i?(i-1)&y:-1)a[x+i]^=1;A[++q]=x,B[q]=y;}int main(){/*freopen("ex_data3.in","r",stdin),freopen("B.out","w",stdout),*/n=read(),m=read(),read();for(int i=0;i<n;++i)a[i]=read();if(n>M){for(int i=1;i<=M;++i)op(Rand()%M,Rand()%(n-M));for(int i=1;i<=10;++i)op(Rand()%(n-M),Rand()%M);}for(int i=0;i<n;++i)if(a[i]){k=n-i<=M?1:M;for(int j=0;j<k;++j)b[j]=(a[i+j]?1:-1);for(int j=1;j<k;j<<=1)for(int l=0;l<k;++l)b[l]+=(j&l?b[j&l]:0);for(int j=x=0;j<k;++j)x=(b[j]>b[x]?j:x);op(i,x);}printf("%d\n",q);for(int i=1;i<=q;++i)printf("%d %d\n",A[i],B[i]);return 0;}
correct_code:
#include<bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;int read(){int num=0,f=1;char c;while(!isdigit(c=getchar()))if(c=='-')f=-1;while(isdigit(c))num=num*10+(c&15),c=getchar();return num*f;}const int N=(1<<20)+5,M=1<<11;mt19937 Rand(2);int n,m,q,k,x,a[N],b[M],A[N],B[N];void op(int x,int y){for(int i=y;i>=0;i=i?(i-1)&y:-1)a[x+i]^=1;A[++q]=x,B[q]=y;}int main(){/*freopen("ex_data3.in","r",stdin),freopen("B.out","w",stdout),*/n=read(),m=read(),read();for(int i=0;i<n;++i)a[i]=read();if(n>M){for(int i=1;i<=M;++i)op(Rand()%M,Rand()%(n-M));for(int i=1;i<=10;++i)op(Rand()%(n-M),Rand()%M);}for(int i=0;i<n;++i)if(a[i]){k=n-i+1<M?1:M;for(int j=0;j<k;++j)b[j]=(a[i+j]?1:-1);for(int j=1;j<k;j<<=1)for(int l=0;l<k;++l)b[l]+=(j&l?b[j^l]:0);for(int j=x=0;j<k;++j)x=(b[j]>b[x]?j:x);op(i,x);}printf("%d\n",q);for(int i=1;i<=q;++i)printf("%d %d\n",A[i],B[i]);return 0;}
